name: SinusBot
tagline: You have to read and agree to the terms in the disclaimer: https://github.com/SinusBot/docker#disclaimer
description:
You have to read and agree to the terms in the disclaimer: https://github.com/SinusBot/docker#disclaimer


_Template derived from caprover/one-click-apps (caprover@bd357c9, Apache-2.0). Default credentials are generated per-app — check the compose environment values._
docker_compose:
services:
  sinusbot:
    environment:
      UID: 1000
      GID: 1000
    image: sinusbot/docker:1.0.0-beta.10-202ee4d
    restart: unless-stopped
    volumes:
      - sinusbot-data:/opt/sinusbot/data
      - sinusbot-scripts:/opt/sinusbot/scripts
    ports:
      - 42110:8087
volumes:
  sinusbot-data: null
  sinusbot-scripts: null
